Off Calendar Jun-16-2023 Continued To Sep-13-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar May-26-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PRECILA BALABBO'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment

Precila Balabbo's unopposed motion to approve Proposition 65 settlment and consent judgement is granted. The parties must provide both a proposed consent judgment and a separate proposed order granting the motion.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/CK)
